articles.title: Tea stall installs water spray to tackle scorching heat in Erode - The Hindu
articles.search_term: (heatwave OR "heat wave" OR "severe heatwave" OR "extreme heat" OR "heat spell" OR "scorching heat" OR "blistering heat" OR "sweltering heat" OR "hot winds" OR loo OR "hot loo winds" OR "intense heat" OR "unbearable heat" OR "deadly heat" OR heat OR "weather forecast" OR "weather update" OR "weather alert" OR "IMD forecast" OR "IMD prediction" OR "IMD alert" OR IMD OR "rising temperatures" OR "temperatures expected to rise" OR "relief from heat" OR "respite from heat" OR "heat respite" OR "respite from scorching heat") Tamil Nadu
articles.full_text:
As temperatures continue to hover above 104°F in Erode, a tea shop on Bhavani Road has come up with an innovative way to beat the heat by installing a water spray system, earning appreciation from customers and passers-by alike.
The summer heat has intensified across the State, with Erode witnessing temperatures ranging between 100°F and 105°F since early March. The harsh sun, coupled with dry and hot winds during the day, has made it difficult for people to step out, particularly in the afternoons, affecting routine activities and small businesses.
Published - April 30, 2026 05:48 pm IST
